elements.name: Tablet-WishList - Verify FREE GIFT items are not allowing to add to list from PDP page

steps.name: User launch the application as a 'Guest' User
User clicks on 'Sign In' button in 'Header' page
User 'clicks' on 'Create an Account' 'link'
User creates a new account with 'no' alert
User 'clicks' on 'menu' 'button'
User 'clicks' on 'Beauty' 'link'
User 'clicks' on 'Free Gifts With Purchase' 'link'

result.error_message:
